loadingPhrases: Getting you on the map shortly…
Kenya has 290 constituencies — we know them all…
Finding the nearest IEBC office to you…
Your vote matters — let's find where to register…
Pulling in diaspora registration centres worldwide…
Verifying office coordinates with satellite imagery…

splash.title: NASAKA
splash.subtitle: IEBC
splash.disclaimer: Allow location access to find the closest IEBC registration center and get turn-by-turn navigation.
splash.locationBlockedDescription: Please enable location in your browser settings and reload
splash.locationPrivacyNote: Your location data is processed locally and never stored on our servers.
splash.copyright: © {{year}} Civic Education Kenya. All rights reserved.
splash.precisionViewDesc: Zoom in (Level 12+) to see all 30k+ registration centres

search.placeholder: Search IEBC offices by county, constituency, or location...
search.noMatchQuery: No offices match "{{query}}". Try a different search.
search.noOfficesInArea: No IEBC offices found in your area.

office.voterRegTapDetails: Tap for details on how to register
office.voterRegistrationDesc: Register as a voter at this IEBC office
office.voterRegDetailsSub: Carry your original ID to your nearest registration centre during the registration period
office.docIDSub: Original Kenyan National ID (not a copy)
office.docPassportSub: For Kenyan citizens abroad or as alternative ID
office.serviceTransferSub: Move your voter registration to a new polling station
office.serviceUpdateSub: Update your personal details on the voter register
office.serviceReplacementSub: Replace a lost or damaged voter registration card
office.diasporaInfoDesc: Contact for diaspora voter registration queries.
office.probableDesc: Likely confirmed for 2027 based on previous cycles.

offline.sidebarDesc: Download map tiles along your route to ensure navigation continues even when you lose internet connection in "dead zones".

bottomSheet.locationAccessDesc: Enable location access to see fare estimates, get directions from your current location, and find the nearest route to this office.
bottomSheet.travelScoreExplanation: Score: 0 (easiest) → 100 (hardest). Factors: distance, time, traffic, weather.
bottomSheet.longDistanceRoutingDesc: You appear to be viewing a location far from your position. If using a VPN, please toggle it for precise domestic routing. For cross-continental travel, we provide deep-links to our trusted navigation partners.
bottomSheet.staleDataWarning: ⏱ Some data may be stale — check again when online
bottomSheet.confirmOffice: Community can confirm if this office is real
bottomSheet.within500m: You must be within 500m of the office
bottomSheet.locationNotStored: Your exact location is not stored
bottomSheet.distanceAway: You're {{distance}}m away. Please move within {{maxDistance}}m of the office to confirm.
bottomSheet.confirmationFailed: Failed to submit confirmation. Please try again.
bottomSheet.locationPermissionRequired: Location permission is required to confirm. Please enable location access and try again.
bottomSheet.tapForGoogleMaps: Tap office for Google Maps directions.
bottomSheet.sidebarDesc: Download map tiles along your route to ensure navigation continues even when you lose internet connection in "dead zones".
bottomSheet.fareDisclaimer: Estimated fares based on August 2024 rates. Actual fare may vary.

layers.iebcOfficesDesc: All IEBC office locations across Kenya
layers.constituenciesDesc: Parliamentary and electoral boundaries across Kenya as defined by IEBC. Each polygon represents one constituency with its corresponding code and name.
layers.healthcareFacilitiesDesc: Distribution of healthcare facilities across the country (large dataset — may take a few extra moments to load)
layers.countiesDesc: Distribution of county borders across the country
layers.myLocationDesc: Show your current location on the map
layers.aboutLayersDesc: Toggle layers on and off to customize your map view. You can combine multiple data layers with different base maps for the best experience.

contribute.title: Contribute Missing Office Location
contribute.description: Help us map all IEBC offices across Kenya by contributing accurate location data.
contribute.googleMapsPlaceholder: Paste Google Maps link or coordinates
contribute.uploadEvidenceDesc: Photo of the office, signage, or surrounding area helps verification
contribute.dragDropOrClick: Drag & drop or click to upload
contribute.movePin: Drag the pin to adjust the exact location
contribute.submissionSuccessDesc: Your contribution has been submitted and will be reviewed by moderators.
contribute.submissionNote: Note: Community verification helps improve accuracy. Thank you for contributing!
contribute.errorInvalidCoordinates: Invalid coordinates. Please check latitude and longitude values.
contribute.errorSubmissionFailed: Failed to submit contribution. Please try again.
contribute.errorLocationPermission: Location permission denied. Please enable location access.
contribute.errorLocationFailed: Failed to get location. Please try manually entering coordinates.
contribute.parseError: Invalid format. Please paste a valid Google Maps link or coordinates.

seo.description: Locate IEBC constituency offices across Kenya. Get directions, registration info, and community-verified locations.
seo.keywords: IEBC office, voter registration Kenya, find IEBC office, registered voters Kenya
seo.ogTitle: Nasaka IEBC - Voter Registration Made Easy
seo.ogDescription: Find your nearest IEBC office instantly.
